TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there are at least 2 elements to perform a reversal
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Reverse the array in place
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n / 2; ++i) {
        int tmp = follow_case.a[i];
        follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[follow_case.n - 1 - i];
        follow_case.a[follow_case.n - 1 - i] = tmp;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
